name: Dip Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, blend the vegetable soup mix and sour cream until smooth.
2. Stir in the grated cheddar cheese until well combined.
3. Allow the dip to chill for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to blend (optional).
4. Serve chilled in a bowl or portioned into an avocado cut in half.
